member.name: E:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.OnProgress
member.summary: Indicate of the progress of the current operation. Description of action Total progress in % Current step (for matching only) Total steps (for matching only)

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.VerifyUkAddressesAsync(System.Data.DataTable,WinPure.AddressVerification.Models.UkAddressVerificationSettings,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Table with source data
Verification settings
Cancellation token for cancelling verification

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.VerifyUkAddresses(System.Data.DataTable,WinPure.AddressVerification.Models.UkAddressVerificationSettings,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Table with source data
Verification settings
Cancellation token to cancel the verification

member.param: Path to SQLite database with source data
Name of table in the database
Verification settings
Cancellation token to cancel the verification

member.summary: In-memory OR online USA address verification.
member.param: Table with source data
Verification settings.
cancellation token to cancel the verification

Verification settings

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.CleanTable(System.Data.DataTable,WinPure.Cleansing.Models.WinPureCleanSettings,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Perform clean operation under the given table with data
member.param: Clean settings
DataTable with data to clean
Cancellation token to cancel the cleansing

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.CalculateStatistic(System.Data.DataTable,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculate statistic for the given table.
member.param: DataTable with data, for which statistic should be calculated
Cancellation token to cancel the statistic calculation

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.MatchData(System.Collections.Generic.List{WinPure.Matching.Models.TableParameter},WinPure.Matching.Models.MatchParameter,System.Collections.Generic.List{WinPure.Matching.Models.FieldMapping},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Input tables with data
Matching parameters
Fields from original table(s), which should be included to the result. If there are multiple tables in source list, then that parameter also define correspondence between fields in different tables

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.SearchData(WinPure.Matching.Models.TableParameter,WinPure.Matching.Models.SearchParameter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search duplicates of value(s) in the given data
member.param: Table with data where we search
Search parameter which define what and in which field should be searched

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.DefineMasterRecord(System.Data.DataTable,WinPure.Matching.Models.MatchParameter,WinPure.Matching.Models.Support.MasterRecordSettings)
member.summary: Define master record according to selected parameters
member.param: Datatable with matching result. It should be same table that was returned by MatchData function.
matching parameters
Master record settings
member.returns: True if master record definition was successed

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.MergeMatchResult(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{WinPure.Matching.Models.Support.MergeMachResultSetting},System.String)
member.param: Datatable with matching result. It should be same table that was returned by MatchData function.
Merge settings for column from match result
character or string to insert between values from merged rows

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.DeleteMergeMatchResult(System.Data.DataTable,WinPure.Matching.Models.Support.DeleteFromMatchResultSetting)
member.summary: Delete rows from the match result accrding to options.
member.param: Datatable with matching result. It should be same table that was returned by MatchData function.
Delete setting
member.returns: New data table with match result. Existing match result table should be overwriting

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.UpdateMatchResult(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{WinPure.Matching.Models.Support.UpdateMatchResultSetting})
member.summary: Update the result acoording to specified mergeSettings.
member.param: Datatable with matching result. It should be same table that was returned by MatchData function.
Update settings for columns from match result

member.name: M:WinPure.API.WinPureApi.RemoveNotDuplicateRecords(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Remove not duplicate rows from match result.
member.param: Datatable with matching result. It should be same table that was returned by MatchData function.
